ocr_findings.description: Cleaned OCR contains '満ま々々' in the sentence about 商標権 expiry. Image text reads '満々' (or similar natural Japanese), suggesting a character duplication artifact during cleaning. Meaning is still recoverable from context.
The ビジネスモデル特許の例 mock UI (通常配送料無料, カートに入れる, 1-Clickで今すぐ買う, ギフト設定 buttons) is rendered as plain text lines rather than a table/box, but content is preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 知的財産権の有効期限 and ビジネスモデル特許 (Lesson 02-02, p.59). Cleaned OCR captures all key terms and explanations correctly. The minor '満ま々々' character artifact is low severity. The Amazon 1-Click UI example is represented as text list items which preserves all content. Label confirmed as content.
